Game.Name: Bananas de Pijamas
Game.Plot: Bananas in Pajamas (Known as Bananas de Pijamas) is a pirate SNES hack of Chester Cheetah: Too Cool to Fool, made by Twin Eagles Group. This game was released in April 1998. It is based on a kids TV series by the same name. The TV series name is spelled in Portuguese in the game.
